candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue figure; clearly labeled as total revenue/sales and matches REVT definition.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used for REVT when a proper revenue line exists.

candidates.row_label: Interest income from bank deposits, money-market funds etc
candidates.why: Interest income on cash, not operating revenue; excluded from REVT.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not revenue; inappropriate for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not revenue; inappropriate for REVT.

variables.notes: Uses the clearly labeled top-line revenue figure; no alternative revenue label is needed.

candidates.why: Direct material costs that vary with production; best available proxy for cost of goods sold.
Likely includes broader personnel costs, partially overhead (SG&A); not pure COGS so excluded for primary mapping.
Mixed operating/overhead costs; more appropriate for SG&A than COGS.
Explicit SG&A category, should be mapped to XSGA, not to COGS.

candidates.row_label: Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility
candidates.why: A broader material-expense category label that may be used in other periods; good secondary COGS candidate if label changes over time.
Aggregate of multiple expense categories including overhead; too broad for COGS when components exist.
Financing costs, not production costs; should not be used for COGS.
Other finance costs, not related to cost of sales; excluded from COGS.
Balance sheet inventory component, not a period expense; not suitable as COGS line item.
Inventory asset category, not an income statement expense; not used for COGS mapping.
Liability for various accrued costs, not a specific cost of sales line.

final_choice.row_label: Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility

variables.notes: Maps direct material cost as primary COGS; includes the alternate material-expense label as a fallback in case of label changes across years.

candidates.why: Ongoing personnel and related social costs that are typical SG&A overhead rather than direct COGS when listed separately from material costs.
Residual operating overhead bucket excluding COGS; suitable as an SG&A component.
Explicit SG&A line, though currently showing as nan; should be included to capture SG&A where reported under this heading in some years.

variables.notes: No single populated SG&A total is available; per instructions, include the explicit SG&A line plus key overhead components (personnel and other operating expenses) and exclude totals like 'Operating Expense'.
No research & development-related row (e.g., R&D, research, development) appears in the income statement preview; XRD is treated as missing/zero.

candidates.why: Represents net finance result (income minus expenses); useful fallback if specific interest expense lines are unavailable, but not preferred when explicit interest expense is present.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Explicit interest expense line, excluding capitalized interest; best primary match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; a specific form of interest expense and a good secondary component for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest expense; relevant as an additional fallback for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest income from bank deposits, money-market funds etc
candidates.why: Interest income, not expense; normally offset against interest expense in net interest but not used directly for XINT which is defined as expense.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not an interest line; not appropriate for XINT.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list favors explicit interest expense lines; net finance is included only as a fallback if specific interest expense values are missing in some periods.

candidates.why: Represents total shareholders’ equity; no separate parent/owner equity line is provided, so this is the best proxy for book equity.
Sum of equity and liabilities; not appropriate as equity alone.
Technical balancing line rather than a substantive reported equity total; the explicit 'Total Equity' is preferable.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing construct, not a standalone equity figure; should not be used for BE.

variables.notes: No separate non-controlling interest or equity-attributable-to-owners line exists; therefore total equity is used for BE and MIB is set to zero.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement measure, not a balance-sheet non-controlling interest; cannot be used to represent minority interest in equity.

variables.notes: The balance sheet shows no line for non-controlling interests/minority interest; MIB is treated as zero, consistent with using 'Total Equity' for BE.
